name: I got hurt on a machine at my factory job in Murray, do I qualify for workers comp?

mainEntity.name: I got hurt on a machine at my factory job in Murray, do I qualify for workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for Utah employees injured on job machinery. Report to employer fast.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if injured by machinery during your job duties in Utah, workers' comp applies regardless of fault.[1][4] It covers medical costs, lost wages (2/3 of average weekly wage), and disability benefits for machine accidents.[2] Key factors: Must be an employee, not independent contractor; injury arose out of employment; report promptly. Pre-existing conditions don't disqualify if aggravated.[7] File claim through employer; if denied, appeal within 20 days in Utah. Free attorney consult clarifies eligibility.

description: Yes for Utah employees injured on job machinery. Report to employer fast.
